items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a white background and a colorful abstract design in the upper left corner. the slide contains two bullet points in black text, each describing a feature of an online banking system. the first bullet point states that all branches under the online banking system will be able to do banking practices using a common server, which is centralized, and that only the branches will be able to enter using a common password. the second bullet point states that any one including any client or any branch from any direction will be able to enter in the system to do banking transactions. at the bottom of the slide, there is a url, "www.assignmentpoint.com," suggesting the source of the presentation.
